note: Daily time blocks. Jeff's brain works fast — each block is ONE focus, scannable. Calendar events mirror these.

blocks.title: FUNDING HOUR
blocks.what: Submit/advance one application. Today: Emergent Ventures.

blocks.title: BUILD BLOCK
blocks.what: Vertex Chat / board / desktop fork. Codex drives, Jeff unblocks.

blocks.title: OUTREACH BLOCK
blocks.what: VC package, Weinstein email, X chains. One send per day.

blocks.title: CREATIVE BLOCK
blocks.what: Clips, film, avatars. Generate, review, approve.

blocks.title: BOARD TIME w/ SAM
blocks.what: Open the board together. Vote priorities. Comment on clips. 1 hour, done.

iphone_alerts: Set with Apple Shortcuts → Automation → 'When I arrive [location]' / 'When I leave' → Show Notification or Open URL http://100.89.238.84:8090/board.html. Calendar events carry their own alerts.
